prompt: Could you look up the course “Intro to Microeconomics” at Downtown Campus and tell me its record ID and current start date? This is only a check for now: do not change, cancel, or notify anything. Do not touch the similarly named course or any related record.

follow_up_turns.content: That is the right course. For that same record only, set the start date to 2026-11-11; keep notifications off.
Small correction: set the start date to 2026-12-15, not 2026-11-11. This replaces only the value from my last message; keep the same record and do not notify anyone.

stages.purpose: Resolve one exact target by name and location while leaving nearby distractors untouched.
Apply the first requested start date only to the resolved target.
Replace the superseded start date on that same target with the user's correction.

response_constraints: Keep every follow-up tied to the record resolved in the preceding stage; do not switch to a similarly named record.
Do not report a lookup or update as successful unless the corresponding tool result establishes it.
After the correction, report the final start date and make clear that the first requested start date was superseded.
Do not state or imply that any course other than the target was modified.
